dataset_description: A dataset of discrete variables including demographic information of the respondents of the Eurobarometer 93.1 together with their opinion about how the COVID-19 emergency was handled by local authorities and its consequences in the long term.

LIFESAT.description: On the whole, are you satisfied with the life you lead? ( "Yes" | "No" )

TRUST.description: Do you trust or not the people in your country? ( "Yes" | "No" )

SATMEAS.description: In general, are you satisfied with the measures taken to fight the Coronavirus outbreak by your government? ( "Yes" | "No" )

HEALTH.description: Thinking about the measures taken by the public authorities in your country to fight the Coronavirus and its effects, would you say that they... ( "Too Health": Focus too much on health | "Too Economy": Focus too much on economivcs | "Balance": Are balanced )

JUSTIFIED.description: Thinking about the measures taken by the public authorities in your country to fight the Coronavirus and its effects, would you say that they were justfied? ( "Yes" | "No" )

PERSONALFIN.description: The Coronavirus outbreak will have serious economic consequences for you personally ( "Suffer" | "Not Suffer" | "Don't know" )

COUNTRYFIN.description: The Coronavirus outbreak will have serious economic consequences for your country ( "Suffer" | "Not Suffer" | "Don't know" )

INFO.description: Which of the following was your primary source of information during the Coronavirus outbreak? ( "Television" | "Press" | "Radio" | "Website" | "Social Network" )

COPING.description: Thinking about the measures taken to fight the Coronavirus outbreak, in particular the confinement measures, would you say that it was an experience...? ( "Easy": Easy to cope with | "Medium": Both easy and difficult to cope with | "Difficult": Difficult to cope with )

POLITICS.description: In political matters people talk of 'the left' and 'the right'. How would you place your views on this scale? ( "Left" | "Centre" | "Right" | "No Answer" )

COMMUNITY.description: Would you say you live in a... ( "Rural": Rural area or village | "Small/Medium": Small or middle sized town | "Large": Large town )

CLASS.description: Do you see yourself and your household belonging to...? ( "Working": Working class | "Lower": Lower class | "Middle": Middle class | "Upper": Upper class )
